personal.preferred_title: Data Analyst & ETL Developer | Python, SQL, Pandas & Reporting

summary: Data engineering and analytics professional with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building ETL pipelines, reporting workflows, dashboards, data validation routines, and stakeholder-facing analytics. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, Pandas, data modeling, automation, performance reporting, and operational data quality. Experienced translating business and technical requirements into reliable datasets, KPI reporting, and actionable insights for decision-making.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and standardization workflows.
Designed reporting datasets and historical schemas in Oracle and Redshift to support capacity analysis, seasonal forecasting, executive reporting, and KPI-style operational dashboards.
Translated infrastructure and application performance requirements into data models, validation rules, reporting outputs, and recurring analytics workflows.
Developed data quality, reconciliation, and troubleshooting routines to validate accuracy of telemetry feeds before reporting and forecasting consumption.
Created interactive Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, and plotly dashboards to surface capacity trends, utilization risks, and operational insights for senior stakeholders.
Automated repetitive reporting and data preparation steps using Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, and scripting to improve consistency and reduce manual effort.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for Brand.com and other revenue-generating systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw user performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for critical hospitality systems, supporting dashboarding, transaction tracing, and performance analysis.
Collaborated with technical teams during production monitoring upgrades and ensured continuity of reporting and visibility through a Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 cutover.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly export processes.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and operational reports adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Worked with stakeholders and application teams to define monitoring requirements, validate production behavior, and document technical procedures.
Supported 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across a large enterprise monitoring environment.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications under load to identify throughput limits, database bottlenecks, thread pressure, heap memory issues, CPU usage, and garbage collection impact.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release gate decisions.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve visibility during performance testing and troubleshooting.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting large transaction volumes.
Built validation tooling in C++/OCCI/OCI to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets.
Automated schema conversion and data validation workflows to ensure integrity during phased migration cutover.
Optimized database access and transaction processing, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.
Supervised QA cycles and production bug triage using Mercury Test Director, supporting test case execution and defect resolution.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit forecasting platform that reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90% and delivered capacity bottleneck predictions 6 months ahead.

projects.name: FAST Project
projects.description: Data-mined synthetic monitoring and user performance metrics to identify optimization opportunities for critical revenue-generating hospitality systems.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python automation pipeline for semantic duplicate detection, LLM-based scoring, resume tailoring, cover generation, quality checks, and application tracking.
